name: @dtc/backend
description: A starter for Lanme Swim projects.
author: Lanme Swim (https://medusajs.com)

scripts.generate-inventory: sh -c 'if [ -f src/scripts/generate-inventory.js ]; then FILE=src/scripts/generate-inventory.js; elif [ -f scripts/generate-inventory.js ]; then FILE=scripts/generate-inventory.js; elif [ -f src/scripts/generate-inventory.ts ]; then FILE=src/scripts/generate-inventory.ts; else FILE=scripts/generate-inventory.ts; fi; exec medusa exec ./"$FILE" -- "$@"' --
scripts.generate-product-variants: sh -c 'if [ -f src/scripts/generate-product-variants.js ]; then FILE=src/scripts/generate-product-variants.js; elif [ -f scripts/generate-product-variants.js ]; then FILE=scripts/generate-product-variants.js; elif [ -f src/scripts/generate-product-variants.ts ]; then FILE=src/scripts/generate-product-variants.ts; else FILE=scripts/generate-product-variants.ts; fi; exec medusa exec ./"$FILE" -- "$@"' --
scripts.setup-product-inventory: sh -c 'if [ -f src/scripts/setup-product-inventory.js ]; then FILE=src/scripts/setup-product-inventory.js; elif [ -f scripts/setup-product-inventory.js ]; then FILE=scripts/setup-product-inventory.js; elif [ -f src/scripts/setup-product-inventory.ts ]; then FILE=src/scripts/setup-product-inventory.ts; else FILE=scripts/setup-product-inventory.ts; fi; exec medusa exec ./"$FILE" -- "$@"' --
